## Description

## iK Multi TR Mini 360 Sprayer

The iK Multi TR Mini 360 offers a professional spray bottle suitable for virtually all of your favorite detailing products. The iK sprayer features a 360° feature that allows you to use the spray bottle in all positions upside down. Super convenient when working on small spaces or hard to reach areas (think wheel wells for example). The iK Mini Sprayer is a handy spray bottle that can be used for all your car detailing work. Moreover, the bottle is made of very sturdy HDPE material with a wide base for more stability so the bottle is less likely to fall over.

### Features iK Multi TR Mini 360

- Professional, small spray bottle

- 360 degree function to spray in all positions upside down

- Ideal for use in small spaces

- Provision for own label

- Specially developed for detailing

- Suitable for virtually all liquids and products

- Limited resistance to acids

- Capacity: 600 ml / 0.6 liter

This spray bottle is not suitable for use with solvents (such as tar removers). For this we recommend the use of the [iK HC TR 1](https://www.cardetail.be/en/product/ik-multi-hc-tr-1-sprayer-lege-sprayfles-oplosmiddelbestendig-1000ml/).
